description: About a half of all new businesses fail in the first five years. Learn about the tools, state-of-the-art valuation methods, and practical knowledge that are needed to make appropriate financing decisions in such highly uncertain environments.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (FINANCE 700andGEN BUS 704) or declared in graduate Business Exchange program
